channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Be brave. That's what Madison Keys kept telling herself on the way to winning the Australian Open
item.description: Madison Keys says she kept telling herself to be brave down the stretch of a tight third set in the Australian Open final against two-time defending champion Aryna Sabalenka.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fragile San Jose Sharks suffer worst home loss of season
item.description: San Jose Sharks' losing streak now at six as they allow four goals to Florida Panthers in second period
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Tyrese Maxey has 31 points and 9 assists in the 76ers' 109-97 victory over the Bulls
item.description: Tyrese Maxey had 31 points and nine assists, Kelly Oubre Jr. added 22 points and 12 rebounds and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Chicago Bulls 109-97 on Saturday night for their second straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 1 Auburn slips past No. 6 Tennessee 53-51 and extends its winning streak to 11 games
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Miles Kelly hit a go-ahead 3-pointer with 30 seconds remaining and Johni Broome had 16 points and 13 rebounds in his return to the lineup as No. 1 Auburn extended its winning streak to 11 games with a 53-51 win over No. 6 Tennessee on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bills offensive coordinator Joe Brady withdraws as Saints head coaching candidate: report
item.description: Despite already meeting with New Orleans Saints brass for an initial interview, Buffalo Bills assistant coach Joe Brady has declined a follow-up conversation with the franchise.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets agree to terms with Broncos executive Darren Mougey to be their general manager
item.description: The New York Jets' lengthy searches are over, and they're pairing a first-time general manager with a first-time head coach to try to turn things around. Denver Broncos assistant general manager Darren Mougey agreed to terms Saturday with the Jets to become their GM.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK JR., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: San Diego Padres announce 2025 theme game schedule and giveaways
item.description: The San Diego Padres have unveiled their 2025 promotional schedule, featuring a variety of exciting giveaways, theme games and fan events throughout the season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Vanderbilt fans storm court again as Commodores beat No. 9 Kentucky 74-69
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tyler Nickel's 3-pointer with 1:50 left put Vanderbilt ahead to stay as the Commodores upset a Top 10 team on their home court for a second straight Saturday by beating No. 9 Kentucky 74-69.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Olympic gymnast Suni Lee vows to never ski again after disastrous first experience
item.description: U.S. Olympian Suni Lee tried her hand at skiing for the first time this week, as seen in her Instagram story, but wound up face-down on the snow.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Avs GM MacFarland felt 'timing was right' to deal star forward Mikko Rantanen
item.description: Facing the prospect of Mikko Rantanen becoming an unrestricted free agent after this season, Colorado general manager Chris MacFarland felt the timing was right to trade the star forward and bolster the Avalanche’s roster for the future.
item.dc:creator: Ken Powtak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jaguars' Liam Coen texted Baker Mayfield he was staying with Bucs before taking head coaching job: report
item.description: New Jacksonville Jaguars head coach Liam Coen texted Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield that he was staying with the Bucs before he took the Jaguars head coaching job, according to ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: With Carroll going to Raiders, Schottenheimer promoted at Cowboys, Coen to Jags, 1 opening remains
item.description: Pete Carroll is set to return to the sideline as a head coach following a one-year hiatus and Brian Schottenheimer and Liam Coen are ready for their first shots at running an NFL team.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aryna Sabalenka slams, throws racket after being upset by Madison Keys in Australian Open final
item.description: Before giving her speech commending Madison Keys on her Australian Open victory, Aryna Sabalenka let out all her frustration from the match on her racket.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Novak Djokovic takes a jab at injury 'experts' by posting a picture of an MRI of his left hamstring
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic posted a scan of his injured left hamstring on social media early Sunday, more than 24 hours after being booed at the Australian Open when he quit playing one set into his semifinal because of what he said at his news conference was a torn muscle.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eli Manning says brother Peyton Manning trying to ‘steal’ playbook, strategies ahead of Pro Bowl 2025
item.description: Eli Manning told Fox News Digital his brother Peyton Manning is looking to steal his strategies and playbook in hopes of defeating him at the 2025 Pro Bowl in Orlando, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian Open: Aryna Sabalenka throws her racket after losing to Madison Keys in the final
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Aryna Sabalenka threw her racket on the sideline. She sat on her bench with a towel over her head.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Winnipeg hat trick sinks Utah HC, 5-2
item.description: WINNIPEG (AP) - Three goals ended Utah's three-game winning streak. Cole Perfetti scored his first NHL hat trick, including the go-ahead goal, for the Winnipeg Jets in a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Canada Life Centre on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team. The Hurricanes acquired forwards Mikko Rantanen from the Colorado Avalanche and Taylor Hall from the Chicago Blackhawks in a three-team trade Friday night.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Whirlwind at Farmers Insurance Open; Wind Delay at Round 2
item.description: Another day spent at Torrey Pines, but it was not a quiet day by any means.. This course is already a difficult in itself, but try adding Santa Ana winds that gust up to 35 miles per hour? The gusts dealing the day an hour and a half suspension..
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Cowboys say offensive coordinator Brian Schottenheimer will be storied franchise’s next coach
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Dallas Cowboys say offensive coordinator Brian Schottenheimer has agreed on a deal to become the storied franchise’s next coach.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The 49ers bring back Robert Saleh for 2nd stint as defensive coordinator
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers hired Robert Saleh for a second stint as defensive coordinator on Friday night after a failed tenure as head coach of the New York Jets. Saleh had been a candidate for head coaching jobs with Jacksonville, Dallas and Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Las Vegas Raiders agree to hire 73-year-old Pete Carroll as their head coach, AP source says
item.description: Pete Carroll has a youthful energy that many people half his age don't possess, and the Raiders hope that enthusiasm — and, more importantly, his proven track record — translates to Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
